## Meeting Purpose

[Review engagement status and align on future strategy and budget.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Engagement is strong:** The strategy sprint is moving at a top 10% pace, driven by a direct feedback loop. The thought leadership workflow is also now in a good rhythm.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Budget approved:** A $20k one-off fee was approved to cover the thought leadership workstream through the March 9th contract renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Strategic pivot:** Post-renewal, \~80% of content effort will shift to the new "agentic engine" product, targeting a 10-50x larger developer market.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [**Renewal planning:** A formal renewal discussion will occur in late Jan/early Feb to define the new content mix and budget.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

## Topics

### Engagement Health & Performance

  - [Erik confirmed the engagement is performing well, citing the existing relationship as a key accelerator.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Strategy Sprint:** Moving at a top 10% pace, enabled by fast review cycles and direct feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership:** Workflow is now in a good rhythm after an initial adjustment period.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

### Strategic Pivot to New Product

  - [**Rationale:** The new "agentic engine" product is the company's primary focus, targeting a 10-50x larger developer market than the current data engineering product.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [**Post-Renewal Plan:** Shift \~80% of content effort to the new product.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Content Mix:** Programmatic, Editorial, and Thought Leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Legacy Product:** Content will be limited to top-of-funnel programmatic.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**Goal:** Maximize content "surface area" for the new product to quickly identify and double down on what works.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### Budget & Contract Amendment

  - [**Issue:** The thought leadership workstream was out of scope for the current contract.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Solution:** A $20k one-off fee was approved to cover the work through the March 9th renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Breakdown:** $10k/month for January & February.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Oversight:** Erik is now the primary point of contact for the account.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [Have Bridget draft the contract amendment for the $20k fee.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
      - [Follow up with Mario on Monday if the fee isn't confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Mario:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [Confirm the $20k fee with finance.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [Schedule a formal renewal discussion for late Jan/early Feb.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [Friday's sync will proceed with Tabe, as Mario is out.](https://fathom.video/share/Z574zThozCsPCdbHzyqKHtxSTScfZ7pg?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
